display.description: A fast filling profile that builds pressure and transitions to a constant flow until the target weight is reached. The benefit is that it retains puck resistance and once dialed in by grind to a peak pressure of 6-9 bar, will maintain the shot time even as the bean ages without adjusting grind size. Adjust the End Flow rate via the Dial to shorten or lengthen the shot time.
display.shortDescription: Fast fill with flow profiling for best puck integrety
